questions.question: In VQE, the quantum computer primarily:
questions.explanation: Quantum computer prepares states and measures expectations.

questions.question: The classical computer in hybrid algorithms:
questions.explanation: Classical optimizer updates parameters based on measured costs.

questions.question: Hybrid algorithms require real-time classical-quantum communication.
questions.explanation: Each iteration requires exchanging parameters and measurement results.

questions.question: The iteration loop in VQE terminates when:

options.text: Convergence criteria met or max iterations

questions.explanation: Loop runs until convergence or iteration limit.
